description: Mobile infernal jailer who keeps pressure through hooked chains and pursuit.

presentation.headline: Hooked-chain pursuer who turns takedowns into relentless movement.
presentation.fantasy_hook: Broken manacles and a heavy crescent chain give this hunter a fast jailer silhouette built around pursuit rather than spellcasting.
presentation.identity_summary: The Chain Warden mixes thrown arcs, close-range blades, and constant repositioning. Takedowns briefly harden the warden and accelerate the chase, rewarding players who stay close to the next target.
presentation.passive_summary: Enemy kills briefly grant movement speed and armor, stacking up to three times while the pursuit continues.
tradeoffs: Needs nearby targets to maintain momentum
Less precise than dedicated ranged hunters
